The '''Remplish''' were a clan native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. After a long holy war on Sullust, they were cast off the planet. Many members of this clan ended up on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] and [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. While living there, they generally operated frontier posts, toll posts, space gates, as well as running almost all of the fuel ports on Gamorr. [[Hepmaga MiOrd]] was one such being who set up a hunting business in the outer wastelands of Gamorr.

==Behind the scenes==
The Remplish were created by [[Jess Lackaff]], a ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan, for the backstory of their [[Hepmaga MiOrd]] entry in the [[Design An Alien]] contest held in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]s''.
